utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) – clear; travel_dates (October 15–19, 2024) – specific; transportation – includes flight details, route, times, airline, and cost; accommodation – includes hotel name, location, type, cost per night, total cost; activities – multiple listed with costs; additional_services – includes local transport pass with cost; total_budget – contains detailed cost breakdown for all categories and total. Therefore, all 7 items are fully included and complete.
